emails.subject: Trip to Japan
emails.body: Trip to Japan For the trip to Kyoto, I would recommend seats in the Green Car (non-smoking) on the Bullet Train. In Tokyo, I think that you and your son would enjoy Odaiba Joypolis. <URL> I also think that Asakusa would be a fun area to visit. <URL> kusa I will talk with my wife this evening to see if she has any additional ideas. Thank you again for lunch.
